content: The crimson sun dipped below the jagged peaks, spilling a bleeding light across the frostbitten tundra. In the silence, the ice whispered ancient secrets to the howling wind.
explanation: This was written by a human fantasy author. AI often struggles with poetic metaphorical consistency like 'whispering ice' without sounding overly cliché.
This cyberpunk scene is completely AI-generated. While it looks hyper-detailed, zooming in reveals that neon signs consist of illegible pseudo-language instead of real words.

content: As the sun set, the sky turned a beautiful shade of red. The mountains were cold and the wind blew strongly across the frozen land.
explanation: This was generated by AI. It uses very generic, safe descriptive language without any deep stylistic flair or unique metaphors.
This is a classical traditional oil painting crafted by a human artist. Notice the authentic, deliberate placement of the brush strokes across the canvas.
This code was generated by an AI. It's perfectly formatted, textbook standard, and lacks any idiosyncratic variable names or comments typical of a rushed human developer.
This was written by a human! The frustrated comment ('wtf why is this breaking') and slightly inefficient state swapping (instead of array destructuring) are dead giveaways.
This was generated by Google's standard Text-to-Speech engine. Notice the rigid pacing, lack of emotional inflection, and perfectly synthesized enunciation.
This is a real recording of JFK's famous Inaugural Address. You can hear the natural room reverb, authentic microphone noise, and genuine human pacing.
